Only tool: `python`. It receives `current_frame`, `previous_frame`, `history`, `transitions`, `last_transition`, `valid_actions`, `last_action_result`, and `action(actions)`.
Only letter-coded board views and lightweight metadata are exposed; raw numeric color IDs are not available.

Use Python to inspect the evidence, refine that world model from the newest history, and search or score candidate actions or short sequences against the current goal as you currently understand it.
Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

When calling `python`, emit exactly the tool-call format shown elsewhere in this prompt for this model. Do not quote or place tool-call markup inside explanatory text; when you decide to call the tool, emit the tool call itself.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The block moved UP 6, RIGHT 3, and DOWN 1 (only 10 actions executed). Looking at the image, the block is now in the right corridor, above the white cross. Let me check the current position and continue moving DOWN to reach the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check block position
print("=== Block position ===")
for i in range(10, 50):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ob':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")
            break

# Check white cross
print("\n=== White cross ===")
for i in range(44, 54):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ww':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")

# Check the area
print("\n=== Current area ===")
for i in range(10, 50):
    row = ascii[i][40:58]
    print(f"{i}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The block is at rows 40-44, cols 49-53. The white cross is at rows 46-48, cols 50-52.
Looking at the area:
- Rows 40-44: Block at cols 49-53, gray at cols 44-48 and cols 54-56
- Rows 45-49: Gray at cols 44-56
The block is at rows 40-44, cols 49-53. The white cross is at rows 46-48, cols 50-52.
To reach the white cross, the block needs to move DOWN 2 times to reach rows 45-49, cols 49-53.
Wait, but the block is 5 rows tall. If it's at rows 40-44, moving DOWN 1 would put it at rows 45-49. So the block needs to move DOWN 1 time to reach rows 45-49, cols 49-53.
The white cross is at rows 46-48, cols 50-52. If the block is at rows 45-49, cols 49-53, it would cover the white cross!
Let me move DOWN 1 time.

# White cross is at rows 46-48, cols 50-52
